value (lowest value is considered 
MC_ENT_ACRDTN_ORG_CD _1); the associated MC_ENT_ACRDTN_ACHVMT_DT and 
MC_ENT_ACRDTN _END_DT use the same numeric suffix. That is, the 
MC_ENT_ACRDTN_ACHVMT_DT_1 is the accreditation achievement start date associated with 
MC_ENT_ACRDTN_ORG_CD_1 and MC_ENT_ACRDTN_ACHVMT_DT_2 is the achievement start date 
associated with MC_ENT_ACRDTN_ORG_CD_2.
